title: onobrychis kurdica
intro: Onobrychis kurdica, also known as Kurdica bird's-foot trefoil, is a flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various ailments. The health benefits of Onobrychis kurdica include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
